name: receipt
style: Invoice-inspired proof posts. Lime for money, aubergine for customer quote.

slides.description: Receipt stamp + massive lime revenue number + subtitle + meta strip (customers/price/hours/cost).
Aubergine quote card for first paying user. Gradient avatar (lime→lavender).
30-day revenue bar chart. Bars use lime→emerald gradient. X-axis day markers.
Build metadata: hours (lime) + cost (lime) + LOC + team size + stack row.
Horizontal bars showing % by channel (LinkedIn/Reddit/IH/WOM). Lime fill.
Cost cell (dark) vs revenue cell (lime bg, black text) + profit summary with dashed lime border.
Section headline + 3 numbered lesson rows; lime numbers.

notes: Revenue numbers are the protagonist — lime used generously here vs other layouts.
Real acquisition % required — don't fake. If exact breakdown unknown, use approximate quartiles.
Quote slide should be a genuine customer voice pulled from replies/reviews, not fabricated.
